concepts.title: Measures of central tendency (mean, median, mode)
concepts.hook: Understand data location; critical for detecting when to use robust statistics.

concepts.title: Measures of spread (variance, std-dev, IQR)
concepts.hook: Quantify data dispersion; essential for identifying outliers.

concepts.title: Skewness and kurtosis
concepts.hook: Detect non-normal distributions; shapes downstream model assumptions.

concepts.title: Covariance and correlation
concepts.hook: Measure linear relationships; foundation for feature engineering.

concepts.title: Bayes' theorem and conditional probability
concepts.hook: Core to hypothesis testing and classification interpretability.

concepts.title: Frequentist vs Bayesian interpretation
concepts.hook: Defines how you construct confidence intervals and credible intervals differently.

concepts.title: Law of large numbers and Central Limit Theorem
concepts.hook: Justifies why sample means are normal; critical for hypothesis tests.

concepts.title: Prior, likelihood, posterior (Bayesian framework)
concepts.hook: Foundation for Bayesian stats, A/B test interpretation, and generative models.

concepts.title: Normal distribution and its properties
concepts.hook: Most common assumption in statistics; basis for linear regression inference.

concepts.title: Binomial and Poisson distributions
concepts.hook: Model discrete counts; used in conversion modeling.

concepts.title: Beta distribution
concepts.hook: Prior for proportions; underpins empirical Bayes and online learning.

concepts.title: Exponential and Weibull distributions
concepts.hook: Model time-to-event; used in survival analysis and failure rate modeling.

concepts.title: Student's t-distribution
concepts.hook: Accounts for small samples; basis for t-tests and regression inference.

concepts.title: Sampling bias and representative samples
concepts.hook: Selection bias contaminates inference; critical to study design.

concepts.title: Power analysis and sample size calculation
concepts.hook: Determines how large a sample you need for adequate statistical power.

concepts.title: Stratified sampling and blocking
concepts.hook: Reduces variance in RCTs; improves experiment efficiency.

concepts.title: Observational vs experimental data
concepts.hook: Only RCTs enable causal inference without strong assumptions.

concepts.title: Null and alternative hypotheses, p-values
concepts.hook: Core framework; p < 0.05 convention often misunderstood.

concepts.title: Type I and Type II errors, power
concepts.hook: Tradeoff in test design; business cost of false positives vs false negatives varies.

concepts.title: Parametric tests (t-test, ANOVA, chi-squared)
concepts.hook: Assumes specific distributions; when assumptions hold, most powerful.

concepts.title: Nonparametric tests (Mann-Whitney, Kruskal-Wallis, permutation tests)
concepts.hook: Distribution-free; robust when assumptions fail.

concepts.title: Multiple comparison correction (Bonferroni, FDR)
concepts.hook: Adjusting for multiple tests; critical in genomics and high-dimensional screening.

concepts.title: Confidence intervals and their interpretation
concepts.hook: NOT "95% chance parameter is in interval"; rather, 95% of similarly-constructed intervals contain the true value.

concepts.title: Bootstrap methods
concepts.hook: Distribution-free confidence intervals; works for any estimator.

concepts.title: Maximum likelihood estimation (MLE)
concepts.hook: Principled parameter estimation; asympotically efficient.

concepts.title: Method of moments
concepts.hook: Simple parameter estimation; sometimes more robust than MLE.

concepts.title: Posterior estimation and credible intervals
concepts.hook: Bayesian analog of confidence intervals; direct probability interpretation.

concepts.title: Conjugate priors
concepts.hook: Closed-form posteriors; simplify computation.

concepts.title: Bayesian hypothesis testing and Bayes factors
concepts.hook: Alternative to p-values; directly compares model support.

concepts.title: Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC)
concepts.hook: Sample from intractable posteriors; enables Bayesian inference at scale.

concepts.title: Randomization and control groups
concepts.hook: Enables causal inference by balancing confounders.

concepts.title: Treatment and control selection
concepts.hook: Control arm must be representative; placebo vs business-as-usual varies by context.

concepts.title: Randomization units (user, session, account)
concepts.hook: Affects power and statistical properties; interference may occur at wrong level.

concepts.title: Pre-registration and REDD (Registered Experiment Design Document)
concepts.hook: Reduces p-hacking and HARKing; best practice in rigorous organizations.

concepts.title: Velocity (sample size per day)
concepts.hook: How quickly you accumulate samples determines time-to-decision.

concepts.title: Duration and seasonal bias
concepts.hook: Running experiments over full weeks avoids day-of-week effects; seasons matter for retention.

concepts.title: Holdout and holdback rates
concepts.hook: Controlling what fraction of traffic enters treatment; necessary for ramp-ups.

concepts.title: Instrumentation and logging
concepts.hook: Garbage in, garbage out; log quality determines metric reliability.

concepts.title: Primary vs secondary metrics
concepts.hook: Primary metric drives decision; secondaries catch side effects.

concepts.title: Guardrail metrics
concepts.hook: Flag if experiment harms critical business outcomes (e.g., latency, revenue).

concepts.title: Metric construction (ratios, counts, timing)
concepts.hook: Ratio metrics (CTR, conversion rate) have different variance properties than counts.

concepts.title: Variance reduction techniques (CUPED, stratification)
concepts.hook: Reduces variance of metric estimate; accelerates power without more users.

concepts.title: Sequential testing and peek penalties
concepts.hook: Stopping early inflates Type I error; corrections needed or use truly sequential methods.

concepts.title: Confidence intervals vs Bayesian posterior
concepts.hook: CI: binary decision at boundary; Bayesian: posterior distribution of effect.

concepts.title: Effect size estimation and practical significance
concepts.hook: Statistical significance != business impact; estimate effect size separately.

concepts.title: Multiple arms and multi-armed bandit (MAB)
concepts.hook: Testing many variants; MAB trades exploration-exploitation for faster learning.

concepts.title: Novelty effects and long-term impact
concepts.hook: Short experiment may not capture habituation or withdrawal effects.

concepts.title: Interference and network effects
concepts.hook: When treatment affects untreated users (e.g., recommendation network); violates independence.

concepts.title: Survivorship bias
concepts.hook: If treatment causes users to churn, survivor cohorts differ; use ITT (intention-to-treat).

concepts.title: Simpson's paradox
concepts.hook: Aggregated effect reverses when stratified; understand confounders.

concepts.title: Joint, marginal, and conditional distributions
concepts.hook: Foundation for graphical models and probabilistic inference.

concepts.title: Independence and conditional independence
concepts.hook: Enables factorization and dimensionality reduction.

concepts.title: Graphical models and d-separation
concepts.hook: Encode conditional independencies; critical for understanding causal assumptions in DAGs.

concepts.title: Prior selection and sensitivity analysis
concepts.hook: "Objective" vs "subjective" priors; robustness to prior choice matters.

concepts.title: Empirical Bayes
concepts.hook: Estimate hyperpriors from data; shrinks estimates toward global mean.

concepts.title: Hierarchical models
concepts.hook: Pool information across groups; improves small-sample estimates.

concepts.title: Model comparison and cross-validation
concepts.hook: AIC, BIC, LOO-CV; trade-offs in model selection.

concepts.title: Linear regression (OLS)
concepts.hook: Baseline supervised learning; understand bias-variance tradeoff.

concepts.title: Assumptions of linear regression (linearity, homoscedasticity, normality, independence)
concepts.hook: Violations affect inference; use diagnostics.

concepts.title: Regularization (Ridge, Lasso, Elastic Net)
concepts.hook: Prevents overfitting; Lasso performs feature selection.

concepts.title: Logistic regression
concepts.hook: Binary classification; log-odds interpretation is key.

concepts.title: Polynomial and spline regression
concepts.hook: Capture nonlinearity; basis expansion approach.

concepts.title: Generalized Linear Models (GLM)
concepts.hook: Extends linear regression to non-normal outcomes.

concepts.title: Classification metrics (precision, recall, F1, AUC, specificity)
concepts.hook: Different metrics suit different business goals; understand tradeoffs.

concepts.title: Confusion matrix and threshold selection
concepts.hook: ROC curves show threshold tradeoffs; choose threshold based on cost.

concepts.title: Imbalanced classification
concepts.hook: Accuracy is misleading; use appropriate metrics and resampling.

concepts.title: Naive Bayes
concepts.hook: Assumes feature independence; surprisingly effective despite strong assumption.

concepts.title: Decision trees
concepts.hook: Interpretable; prone to overfitting without pruning.

concepts.title: Random forests
concepts.hook: Ensemble of trees; reduces variance via bagging.

concepts.title: Gradient Boosting (XGBoost, LightGBM)
concepts.hook: Sequential tree building; strong baseline for tabular data.

concepts.title: Support Vector Machines (SVM)
concepts.hook: Max-margin classifier; kernel trick enables nonlinear boundaries.

concepts.title: K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN)
concepts.hook: Simple baseline; sensitive to scaling and curse of dimensionality.

concepts.title: K-means and initialization
concepts.hook: Minimizes within-cluster variance; k-means++ improves initialization.

concepts.title: Hierarchical clustering
concepts.hook: Produces dendrograms; interpretable but computationally expensive.

concepts.title: DBSCAN
concepts.hook: Density-based; handles non-convex clusters and noise.

concepts.title: Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM)
concepts.hook: Probabilistic clustering; EM algorithm fits the model.

concepts.title: Dimensionality reduction for clustering
concepts.hook: Curse of dimensionality; reduce d before clustering.

concepts.title: Principal Component Analysis (PCA)
concepts.hook: Orthogonal linear combination of features; maximizes variance.

concepts.title: t-SNE and UMAP
concepts.hook: Nonlinear manifold learning; useful for visualization.

concepts.title: Feature selection vs feature extraction
concepts.hook: Selection preserves interpretability; extraction creates new features.

concepts.title: Variance explained and scree plots
concepts.hook: How many components to keep; elbow method is heuristic.

concepts.title: Train/validation/test splits
concepts.hook: Train learns parameters; validation tunes hyperparameters; test estimates generalization.

concepts.title: Cross-validation (k-fold, stratified)
concepts.hook: More stable estimates than single holdout; stratification for imbalanced data.

concepts.title: Learning curves
concepts.hook: Diagnose bias (high training error) vs variance (gap between train and test).

concepts.title: Hyperparameter tuning (grid search, random search, Bayesian optimization)
concepts.hook: Random search often beats grid; Bayesian methods are sample-efficient.

concepts.title: Overfitting, underfitting, and regularization
concepts.hook: Classic bias-variance tradeoff visualized in learning curves.

concepts.title: DAGs (Directed Acyclic Graphs) and causal assumptions
concepts.hook: Visually encode causal structure; enables identification of estimands.

concepts.title: Confounders, colliders, mediators
concepts.hook: Types of nodes with different blocking and conditioning implications.

concepts.title: Backdoor criterion
concepts.hook: Conditions for valid adjustment sets that block confounding paths.

concepts.title: Frontdoor criterion
concepts.hook: Identifies causal effect when confounder unmeasured but mediator observed.

concepts.title: Randomized experiments as gold standard
concepts.hook: RCTs eliminate confounding; but often infeasible.

concepts.title: Matching and propensity scores
concepts.hook: Match treated and control units on observed confounders; reduces model dependence.

concepts.title: Difference-in-differences
concepts.hook: Compares trends; eliminates constant unobserved confounders.

concepts.title: Instrumental variables (IV)
concepts.hook: Uses exogenous variation to identify causal effects despite endogeneity.

concepts.title: Regression discontinuity
concepts.hook: Exploits cutoff in assignment; quasi-experimental design.

concepts.title: Unconfoundedness and SUTVA assumptions
concepts.hook: Strong assumptions; rarely fully hold in practice.

concepts.title: Sensitivity analysis for hidden bias
concepts.hook: How robust are conclusions to violations of unconfoundedness?

concepts.title: Mediation analysis
concepts.hook: Decompose total effect into direct and indirect paths.

concepts.title: Defining success metrics and north star
concepts.hook: Align metrics with business goals; avoid unintended consequences.

concepts.title: Actionable metrics vs vanity metrics
concepts.hook: Actionable: you can influence it and it correlates to business value.

concepts.title: Leading vs lagging indicators
concepts.hook: Leading (e.g., engagement) predicts lagging (e.g., retention); use for early signals.

concepts.title: Cohort analysis and retention curves
concepts.hook: Track user cohorts over time; detect user lifecycle patterns.

concepts.title: Cost-benefit analysis and ROI
concepts.hook: Tradeoff: cost of running experiment vs value of information.

concepts.title: Opportunity sizing
concepts.hook: How many users/dollars affected? Prioritize high-impact opportunities.

concepts.title: Stakeholder alignment and communication
concepts.hook: Frame results for product, engineering, and exec audiences differently.

concepts.title: Data-driven decision culture
concepts.hook: Testing and experimentation become operational norms.

concepts.title: Funnel analysis
concepts.hook: Track user drop-off at each step; identify bottlenecks.

concepts.title: Feature adoption and engagement metrics
concepts.hook: DAU, MAU, feature-level engagement guide product roadmap.

concepts.title: Churn prediction and retention modeling
concepts.hook: Identify at-risk users; test interventions.

concepts.title: Network effects and viral loops
concepts.hook: Measure how users drive adoption of other users.

concepts.title: SELECT, WHERE, GROUP BY, HAVING
concepts.hook: Core query building blocks.

concepts.title: Aggregation functions (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MAX)
concepts.hook: Summarize data across groups.

concepts.title: Joins (INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL OUTER)
concepts.hook: Combine tables; understand join types and cardinality.

concepts.title: Subqueries and CTEs (WITH clauses)
concepts.hook: Modularize logic; improve readability.

concepts.title: Window functions (ROW_NUMBER, RANK, LAG, LEAD)
concepts.hook: Compute running totals, ranks, and neighbor operations without aggregation.

concepts.title: Recursive CTEs
concepts.hook: Traverse hierarchical structures (e.g., org charts, trees).

concepts.title: Set operations (UNION, INTERSECT, EXCEPT)
concepts.hook: Combine multiple result sets.

concepts.title: CASE statements for conditional logic
concepts.hook: Branch within queries; enables metric definitions.

concepts.title: Partitioning and ordered analytics
concepts.hook: Compute aggregates within partitions; essential for funnel and cohort analysis.

concepts.title: Index strategies
concepts.hook: Speed up WHERE and JOIN conditions; tradeoff: write speed.

concepts.title: Query execution plans
concepts.hook: Understand how database executes queries; identify bottlenecks.

concepts.title: Avoiding common pitfalls (N+1 queries, missing JOINs)
concepts.hook: Write efficient queries that don't explode data or compute.

concepts.title: Guardrail metrics and alert thresholds
concepts.hook: Detect performance degradation; avoid false alarms.

concepts.title: Seasonality and deseasonalization
concepts.hook: Remove seasonal patterns for cleaner signals; use deseasonalized metrics.

concepts.title: Anomaly detection
concepts.hook: Detect unusual behavior in metrics; statistical or algorithmic approaches.

concepts.title: Dashboards and real-time reporting
concepts.hook: Visualization; enable rapid decisions.

concepts.title: Data validation and schema checks
concepts.hook: Catch upstream errors; prevent bad data flowing downstream.

concepts.title: Missing data and imputation
concepts.hook: MCAR, MAR, MNAR; listwise deletion vs imputation varies in bias.

concepts.title: Outlier detection
concepts.hook: Statistical (z-score, IQR) vs domain (business rule) approaches.

concepts.title: Data lineage and versioning
concepts.hook: Track how data flows; reproduce results.

classical-machine-learning-shared-with-d.label: Classical Machine Learning (Shared with DS, deeper focus)

concepts.title: Decision tree construction (Information Gain, Gini impurity)
concepts.hook: Understand splitting criteria and why different metrics rank features differently.

concepts.title: Tree depth and pruning strategies
concepts.hook: Manage model complexity; cost-complexity pruning is principled.

concepts.title: Random forest: bagging and OOB error
concepts.hook: Bootstrap aggregation reduces variance; OOB provides free validation.

concepts.title: Gradient boosting mechanics (loss, gradient, residuals)
concepts.hook: Sequential residual learning; why gradient boosting works.

concepts.title: LightGBM and XGBoost tuning
concepts.hook: Leaf-wise vs level-wise growth; learning rate, max depth, subsample tradeoffs.

concepts.title: SHAP and feature importance
concepts.hook: Explain predictions; distinguish feature importance from selection.

concepts.title: Perceptron and multi-layer perceptron (MLP)
concepts.hook: Single hidden layer universal approximator; deep networks reduce neurons needed.

concepts.title: Activation functions (ReLU, tanh, sigmoid, Swish)
concepts.hook: Nonlinearity enables learning complex functions; ReLU dominance due to computational efficiency.

concepts.title: Loss functions (MSE, cross-entropy, focal loss)
concepts.hook: Different losses suit different tasks; know why softmax + cross-entropy preferred over softmax + MSE.

concepts.title: Backpropagation and gradient computation
concepts.hook: Chain rule through layers; computational graph.

concepts.title: Initialization strategies (He, Xavier)
concepts.hook: Poor initialization causes vanishing/exploding gradients; variance of activations matters.

concepts.title: Learning rates and schedules (cosine annealing, warm restarts)
concepts.hook: Learning rate is most important hyperparameter; schedules improve convergence.

concepts.title: Optimization algorithms (SGD, Momentum, Adam, AdamW)
concepts.hook: SGD + momentum is still strong; Adam adaptive learning rates help with sparse gradients; AdamW decouples weight decay.

concepts.title: Gradient clipping and numerical stability
concepts.hook: Prevent exploding gradients; especially important in RNNs.

concepts.title: Dropout and batch normalization
concepts.hook: Dropout: stochastic regularization; BN: reduces internal covariate shift and acts as regularizer.

concepts.title: L1 and L2 regularization
concepts.hook: L2 penalizes all weights; L1 induces sparsity.

concepts.title: Early stopping
concepts.hook: Simple and effective; use validation set to detect overfitting.

concepts.title: Data augmentation
concepts.hook: Increases effective training set; task-specific (image rotation, text substitution).

concepts.title: Mixup and CutMix
concepts.hook: Novel augmentations; train on interpolated examples.

concepts.title: Label smoothing
concepts.hook: Soften targets; improves generalization and calibration.

concepts.title: Convolution operation and receptive fields
concepts.hook: Spatial locality and weight sharing; receptive field determines what context layer sees.

concepts.title: Pooling and spatial downsampling
concepts.hook: Max pooling vs average pooling; destroys some spatial structure.

concepts.title: Common architectures (ResNet, VGG, Inception)
concepts.hook: ResNets' skip connections enable deep training; understand motivation.

concepts.title: Transfer learning and fine-tuning
concepts.hook: Pre-trained weights accelerate learning; layer freezing vs full fine-tune tradeoff.

concepts.title: 1x1 convolutions and depthwise separable convolutions
concepts.hook: Dimensionality reduction and efficient mobile networks.

concepts.title: Normalization layers (BatchNorm, LayerNorm, GroupNorm, InstanceNorm)
concepts.hook: Different norms suit different scenarios; LayerNorm better for RNNs and transformers.

concepts.title: RNN fundamentals and backprop through time (BPTT)
concepts.hook: Unroll over time; gradients flow backward through sequences.

concepts.title: Vanishing/exploding gradient problem
concepts.hook: BPTT gradient magnitude shrinks or explodes with sequence length.

concepts.title: LSTM and GRU gates
concepts.hook: Gate mechanisms solve gradient flow; forget gate prevents vanishing, input gate selective updates.

concepts.title: Bidirectional RNNs
concepts.hook: Condition on future context; why unidirectional for language modeling.

concepts.title: Sequence-to-sequence and attention
concepts.hook: Encoder-decoder for variable-length outputs; attention learns alignment.

concepts.title: Scaled dot-product attention
concepts.hook: Why scaling by sqrt(d): stabilizes gradients; prevents softmax saturation.

concepts.title: Multi-head attention
concepts.hook: Different representation subspaces; interpretable as different "roles" or query types.

concepts.title: Positional encodings and rotary position embeddings (RoPE)
concepts.hook: Transformers are permutation-invariant; add position info; RoPE scales to longer sequences.

concepts.title: Self-attention and its computational complexity
concepts.hook: O(n^2) complexity; critical bottleneck for long sequences.

concepts.title: Causality and causal masking
concepts.hook: Language models mask future tokens; enables autoregressive generation.

concepts.title: Layer normalization placement and residual connections
concepts.hook: Pre-LN vs post-LN; architectures differ in stability.

concepts.title: Vision transformers (ViT)
concepts.hook: Patch embedding + transformer encoder; matches CNNs with more compute.

concepts.title: Autoencoders and VAE
concepts.hook: Unsupervised dimensionality reduction; VAE adds probabilistic interpretation.

concepts.title: Diffusion models (forward and reverse process)
concepts.hook: Iterative denoising; state-of-the-art for image generation.

concepts.title: Denoising score matching
concepts.hook: Learn score function for reverse diffusion; enables stable training.

concepts.title: GANs (discriminator, generator, adversarial loss)
concepts.hook: Generator fooling discriminator; notoriously unstable.

concepts.title: Wasserstein GAN and gradient penalty
concepts.hook: Improves training stability; addresses mode collapse.

concepts.title: Data loading and preprocessing at scale
concepts.hook: Bottleneck for training; parallelization and prefetching matter.

concepts.title: Shuffling and batching strategies
concepts.hook: Shuffling for unbiased gradients; batch size affects learning dynamics.

concepts.title: Data normalization (z-score, min-max)
concepts.hook: Standardize features; impacts learning rate effectiveness.

concepts.title: Imbalanced data and oversampling/undersampling
concepts.hook: Class weights vs resampling; weighted loss more efficient.

concepts.title: Image augmentation pipelines (torchvision, albumentations)
concepts.hook: Online augmentation improves generalization; computational cost.

concepts.title: Loss curves and convergence diagnostics
concepts.hook: Training loss plateau suggests learning rate too low; loss spike suggests too high.

concepts.title: Gradient accumulation
concepts.hook: Simulate larger batches with memory constraints; effective batch size = gradient_steps * batch_size.

concepts.title: Mixed precision training (fp16, bfloat16)
concepts.hook: Reduce memory; maintain accuracy with loss scaling.

concepts.title: Checkpointing and recovery
concepts.hook: Save model state; resume from checkpoints; track best model.

concepts.title: Validation strategy and metric selection
concepts.hook: Validation frequency; which metric to monitor for early stopping.

concepts.title: Data parallelism (DDP)
concepts.hook: Replicate model across GPUs; each GPU processes different batch; synchronize gradients.

concepts.title: Gradient synchronization and all-reduce
concepts.hook: Ring all-reduce reduces communication overhead.

concepts.title: Tensor parallelism and model sharding
concepts.hook: Split model across devices; each device computes different parts of layers.

concepts.title: Pipeline parallelism and micro-batching
concepts.hook: Temporal pipeline; GPUs at different stages process different mini-batches.

concepts.title: Distributed sampling and epoch synchronization
concepts.hook: Ensure no data duplication across workers; synchronize epoch boundaries.

concepts.title: Grid search, random search, Bayesian optimization
concepts.hook: Grid: exhaustive but expensive; Random: baseline; Bayesian: sample-efficient.

concepts.title: Learning rate schedules (constant, step decay, cosine annealing, warm restarts)
concepts.hook: Cosine annealing and warm restarts outperform constant schedules.

concepts.title: Momentum and weight decay interaction
concepts.hook: Weight decay != L2 regularization in Adam; AdamW decouples them.

concepts.title: Batch size effects on generalization
concepts.hook: Larger batches: noisier gradients can improve generalization; but convergence plateaus.

concepts.title: Population-based training (PBT)
concepts.hook: Dynamically adjust hyperparameters during training; parallel population of trials.

concepts.title: Classification metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1, AUC-ROC, AUC-PR)
concepts.hook: Know when to use each; ROC vs PR tradeoff.

concepts.title: Regression metrics (MAE, MSE, RMSE, R-squared, quantile loss)
concepts.hook: RMSE emphasizes outliers; MAE robust; quantile loss for asymmetric cost.

concepts.title: Ranking metrics (NDCG, MAP, MRR)
concepts.hook: Position-aware; used in recommender and search systems.

concepts.title: Calibration and Brier score
concepts.hook: Model confidence matches true probability; separate from accuracy.

concepts.title: Confusion matrix and per-class performance
concepts.hook: Identify which classes are confused; guides data collection.

concepts.title: Residual analysis in regression
concepts.hook: Plots reveal heteroscedasticity, nonlinearity, outliers.

concepts.title: Learning curves and bias-variance decomposition
concepts.hook: Diagnose if you need more data (variance) or simpler model (bias).

concepts.title: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection
concepts.hook: Identify when test data differs from training; calibration methods.

concepts.title: Adversarial examples and adversarial robustness
concepts.hook: Small perturbations fool models; certified defenses exist.

concepts.title: Data poisoning and model backdoors
concepts.hook: Malicious training data corrupts models; defenses include anomaly detection.

concepts.title: Model stealing and intellectual property
concepts.hook: Extracting model via API queries; mitigations: query throttling, output quantization.

concepts.title: Fairness metrics (demographic parity, equalized odds, calibration)
concepts.hook: Different fairness notions suit different contexts.

concepts.title: Domain-specific feature engineering
concepts.hook: Task knowledge drives feature creation; often beats automatic feature learning.

concepts.title: Polynomial and interaction features
concepts.hook: Capture nonlinearity and interactions; exponential growth with polynomial degree.

concepts.title: Embedding-based features
concepts.hook: Learn dense representations from categorical data; reduces sparsity.

concepts.title: Temporal features (lag, rolling window, seasonal decomposition)
concepts.hook: Time-series specific; encode temporal patterns.

concepts.title: Filter methods (correlation, mutual information, statistical tests)
concepts.hook: Fast, model-agnostic; may miss interactions.

concepts.title: Wrapper methods (forward/backward selection, RFE)
concepts.hook: Model-dependent; computationally expensive but captures interactions.

concepts.title: Embedded methods (feature importance from tree models, L1 regularization)
concepts.hook: Efficient; coupled to model training.

concepts.title: Multicollinearity and correlation cleanup
concepts.hook: High correlation inflates variance in linear models; remove redundant features.

concepts.title: Model checkpoints and state dicts
concepts.hook: Save weights and architecture; torch.save, pickle, ONNX.

concepts.title: ONNX format and cross-framework compatibility
concepts.hook: Standardized format; enables framework-agnostic serving.

concepts.title: TensorFlow SavedModel and PyTorch TorchScript
concepts.hook: Serialized models with computation graphs; enable optimizations.

concepts.title: Quantization for storage and inference speedup
concepts.hook: INT8, bfloat16; tradeoff: accuracy vs speed and memory.

concepts.title: Batch inference vs online (real-time) inference
concepts.hook: Batch: high throughput, high latency; online: low latency, throughput constraints.

concepts.title: REST APIs and gRPC for model endpoints
concepts.hook: REST: JSON; gRPC: binary, streaming; gRPC faster.

concepts.title: Model versioning and A/B testing in production
concepts.hook: Shadow traffic, canary rollouts; compare model versions.

concepts.title: Caching and memoization
concepts.hook: Cache predictions for repeat queries; TTL tradeoff.

concepts.title: TensorFlow Serving, TorchServe, Seldon Core, BentoML
concepts.hook: Deployment platforms; differ in model formats, scaling, monitoring.

concepts.title: Container orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes)
concepts.hook: Package model + dependencies; orchestrate scaling and updates.

concepts.title: Load balancing and horizontal scaling
concepts.hook: Distribute requests across replicas; autoscaling on latency or QPS.

concepts.title: Cold start and model loading time
concepts.hook: Minimize latency when spawning new replicas; preload models or use fast deserialization.

concepts.title: Latency, throughput, error rates
concepts.hook: SLOs: p99 latency < Xms, uptime > 99.9%.

concepts.title: Prediction drift and label shift
concepts.hook: Model input distribution changes (drift) or output distribution changes (label shift).

concepts.title: Model performance degradation (accuracy drop, calibration shift)
concepts.hook: Compare predictions against held-out validation set.

concepts.title: Resource utilization (GPU memory, CPU, I/O)
concepts.hook: Detect inefficiencies; predict capacity needs.

concepts.title: Feature distribution monitoring
concepts.hook: Alert if feature mean/std deviate from training; causes model degradation.

concepts.title: Missing value and anomaly monitoring
concepts.hook: Incomplete or corrupted features cause errors.

concepts.title: Data freshness
concepts.hook: Ensure data pipeline hasn't stalled; outdated data degrades predictions.

concepts.title: Schema drift and pipeline monitoring
concepts.hook: Upstream changes break downstream; version data schemas.

concepts.title: Retraining triggers (periodic, drift-based, performance-based)
concepts.hook: When to update model? Cost vs benefit; detect degradation.

concepts.title: Online learning and incremental updates
concepts.hook: Update model with new data without full retraining; works for some models.

concepts.title: Experiment tracking and model registry
concepts.hook: MLflow, Weights & Biases; track experiments, models, parameters.

concepts.title: Reproducibility and versioning
concepts.hook: Track code, data, seeds; reproduce results.

concepts.title: Feature definitions and computation
concepts.hook: Centralized feature library; compute once, reuse everywhere.

concepts.title: Online vs offline feature stores
concepts.hook: Offline for training; online for low-latency serving.

concepts.title: Feature freshness and staleness SLOs
concepts.hook: How up-to-date features must be; varies by use case.

concepts.title: Point-in-time correctness and data leakage prevention
concepts.hook: Training features must use only data available at prediction time.

concepts.title: Data warehouse architecture (star schema, fact/dimension tables)
concepts.hook: Organized storage for analytics and training data.

concepts.title: ETL vs ELT
concepts.hook: Transform before or after loading; ELT more flexible with cloud databases.

concepts.title: Incremental and full refresh logic
concepts.hook: Full refresh: simple, expensive; incremental: efficient, complex.

concepts.title: Scaled dot-product attention derivation
concepts.hook: Query-key-value projection; why sqrt(d) normalization.

concepts.title: Multi-head attention and head roles
concepts.hook: Different heads learn different attention patterns; interpretability.

concepts.title: Cross-attention vs self-attention
concepts.hook: Self: within sequence; cross: between encoder and decoder outputs.

concepts.title: Grouped-query attention (GQA) and multi-query attention (MQA)
concepts.hook: KV heads < Q heads; reduces KV cache size in inference.

concepts.title: Efficient attention (FlashAttention, FlashAttention-2, FlashAttention-3)
concepts.hook: Hardware-aware IO-optimal attention; 2-3x faster on H100.

concepts.title: Sparse attention patterns (local, strided, longformer pattern)
concepts.hook: Reduce O(n^2) to O(n) for specific patterns; tradeoff: limited receptive field.

concepts.title: Absolute positional encodings (sinusoidal)
concepts.hook: Encode position; length generalization limited.

concepts.title: Rotary position embeddings (RoPE)
concepts.hook: Rotate query-key vectors; better length extrapolation than sinusoidal.

concepts.title: Relative position embeddings (ALiBi)
concepts.hook: Bias attention by relative distance; enables extreme length generalization.

concepts.title: RoPE interpolation and extrapolation
concepts.hook: Extend context length post-training; interpolate or truncate embeddings.

concepts.title: KV cache in autoregressive generation
concepts.hook: Store past K and V to avoid recomputation; but consumes GPU memory.

concepts.title: Paged attention (vLLM's PagedAttention)
concepts.hook: Treat KV cache as virtual memory; pages reduce fragmentation.

concepts.title: KV cache quantization and compression
concepts.hook: Store KV in INT4 or INT8; reduces memory at quantization cost.

concepts.title: KV cache eviction policies and memory limits
concepts.hook: Determine which past tokens to drop when memory full.

concepts.title: Extrapolation on longer sequences post-training
concepts.hook: Models train on 2K-4K tokens; serve 32K+; RoPE interpolation helps.

concepts.title: Ring attention and paged attention for long context
concepts.hook: Enable serving long contexts without quadratic memory.

concepts.title: Continued pre-training on longer sequences
concepts.hook: Fine-tune attention for longer contexts; improves but slow.

concepts.title: Causal masking and autoregressive generation
concepts.hook: Mask future tokens; generate left-to-right.

concepts.title: Decoder-only vs encoder-decoder tradeoff
concepts.hook: Decoder-only: simpler, more parameter-efficient for generation; encoder-decoder: enables bidirectional context.

concepts.title: GPT, Llama, Mistral, Qwen architectures
concepts.hook: Most modern LLMs are decoder-only; architectural choices vary (normalization, activation, attention type).

concepts.title: Encoder-decoder architecture and cross-attention
concepts.hook: Encoder processes input; decoder generates output conditioned on encoder.

concepts.title: T5 and BART models
concepts.hook: Encoder-decoder for seq2seq; effective for translation, summarization.

concepts.title: Mixture of Experts (MoE)
concepts.hook: Conditional computation; route tokens to expert subsets; sparse activation.

concepts.title: Jamba and hybrid SSM-Transformer models
concepts.hook: Combine attention layers with Mamba SSM layers; trade-offs in scaling and inference.

concepts.title: Scaling laws for loss and compute
concepts.hook: Loss ~ 1/N^alpha; predictable improvements with more data/compute.

concepts.title: Optimal batch sizes and data/compute tradeoff
concepts.hook: Chinchilla scaling: equal budget to compute and data.

concepts.title: Inference-scaling and test-time compute (o1, reasoning models)
concepts.hook: More test-time steps improve reasoning; o3 sets benchmarks.

concepts.title: Frontier model performance (GPT-4, Claude 3.7, Gemini 3)
concepts.hook: Understand where state-of-the-art sits; performance gaps on benchmarks.

concepts.title: Dense embeddings and contrastive learning
concepts.hook: Embedding models trained to maximize similarity of relevant pairs.

concepts.title: MTEB benchmark and evaluation
concepts.hook: Standard benchmark for embedding models across retrieval, clustering, classification.

concepts.title: Leading embedding models (BGE-M3, E5, Voyage, Cohere, OpenAI text-embedding-3)
concepts.hook: Know performance and cost tradeoff; multilingual vs English-only.

concepts.title: Multilingual and cross-lingual embeddings
concepts.hook: BGE-M3 supports 100+ languages; enables global retrieval.

concepts.title: Specialized embeddings (medical, code, domain-specific)
concepts.hook: Domain-tuned models often beat general models; tradeoff: training cost.

concepts.title: Vector database landscape (Pinecone, Qdrant, Weaviate, Milvus, pgvector, LanceDB)
concepts.hook: Know use cases: managed (Pinecone) vs open-source; Qdrant best OSS speed.

concepts.title: Exact vs approximate nearest neighbor search (HNSW, IVF)
concepts.hook: Exact: slow but accurate; approx: fast, some recall loss.

concepts.title: Hybrid search (dense + sparse/BM25)
concepts.hook: Combine semantic and keyword search; Qdrant, Weaviate, Milvus support native hybrid.

concepts.title: Vector database selection criteria (scale, latency, cost)
concepts.hook: pgvector: < 10M vectors, existing Postgres; Qdrant: open-source speed; Pinecone: managed ease.

concepts.title: Indexing strategies and performance tuning
concepts.hook: HNSW parameter tuning (M, ef); IVF cluster count; tradeoffs in speed/recall.

concepts.title: RAG pipeline architecture (retriever, ranker, reader)
concepts.hook: Retrieve docs → rank → feed to LLM.

concepts.title: Retriever design (BM25, dense, hybrid, multi-hop)
concepts.hook: Dense: semantic; BM25: keyword; hybrid: best of both; multi-hop: chain retrievals.

concepts.title: Chunk size and overlap in document splitting
concepts.hook: Small chunks: precise but risk losing context; large: contextual but noisy retrieval.

concepts.title: Re-ranking and cross-encoder models
concepts.hook: Second-pass ranking improves final retrieval quality; expensive but worth it for top-k.

concepts.title: Query expansion and rewriting
concepts.hook: Reformulate query to improve retrieval; LLM-based expansion.

concepts.title: Few-shot vs zero-shot prompting
concepts.hook: Examples improve performance; cost-quality tradeoff.

concepts.title: Chain-of-thought prompting
concepts.hook: Ask model to reason step-by-step; improves complex reasoning.

concepts.title: Instruction following and task formatting
concepts.hook: Clear instructions improve responses; format matters.

concepts.title: System prompts and model steering
concepts.hook: System role sets behavior; guides model outputs.

concepts.title: Tree-of-Thoughts and graph-of-thoughts
concepts.hook: Explore multiple reasoning paths; cost vs accuracy.

concepts.title: Self-consistency and majority voting
concepts.hook: Sample multiple outputs; vote on answer; reduces variance.

concepts.title: Prompt optimization and automated prompt learning
concepts.hook: Gradient-free methods optimize prompts for tasks.

concepts.title: Why ICL works (gradient descent interpretation)
concepts.hook: Implicit task understanding; not explicit learning but implicit optimization.

concepts.title: Scaling laws for in-context learning
concepts.hook: More examples improve accuracy; plateaus exist.

concepts.title: Context order and recency bias
concepts.hook: Order of examples affects performance; recent examples weighted more.

concepts.title: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on instruction data
concepts.hook: Teach model to follow instructions; improves instruction-following.

concepts.title: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (LoRA, QLoRA, LLaMA-Adapter)
concepts.hook: LoRA: low-rank updates; QLoRA: 4-bit + LoRA; fits on single GPU.

concepts.title: Domain-specific fine-tuning
concepts.hook: Adapt to domain (medical, legal, code); improves in-domain performance.

concepts.title: Continued pre-training on domain data
concepts.hook: Add domain tokens to vocab; pre-train on domain corpus.

concepts.title: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF)
concepts.hook: Reward model trained on human preferences; policy optimized against reward.

concepts.title: Reward modeling and preference data
concepts.hook: Collect pairwise comparisons; train reward model; must generalize.

concepts.title: Policy optimization (REINFORCE, PPO)
concepts.hook: PPO staple; on-policy; clipped objective prevents instability.

concepts.title: KL divergence constraint and reference model
concepts.hook: Prevent policy drifting too far from SFT model; reference model in loss.

concepts.title: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO)
concepts.hook: Skip reward model; optimize pairwise loss directly.

concepts.title: SimPO, ORPO, KTO post-DPO landscape
concepts.hook: SimPO: remove reference model; ORPO: merge SFT; KTO: handle unpaired data.

concepts.title: GRPO (Group Relative Policy Optimization)
concepts.hook: Online RL; sample groups, compute advantages within groups.

concepts.title: Iterative improvement (DPO → new data → DPO)
concepts.hook: Self-play improves model; iterative rounds push capabilities.

concepts.title: vLLM (paged attention, continuous batching)
concepts.hook: Production standard; PagedAttention reduces KV cache fragmentation; continuous batching high throughput.

concepts.title: TensorRT-LLM (NVIDIA's compiled inference)
concepts.hook: Maximum performance on NVIDIA GPUs; 28-min compilation cost; best for stable models.

concepts.title: SGLang and RadixAttention
concepts.hook: Shared prefix optimization; ideal for multi-turn and structured generation.

concepts.title: Ollama for local inference
concepts.hook: Simplified model serving; good for prototyping on CPU/GPU.

concepts.title: Other frameworks: MLC LLM, LM Studio, llama.cpp
concepts.hook: Lightweight/portable options; tradeoffs in performance.

concepts.title: Token batching and dynamic batching
concepts.hook: Batch requests; balance latency and throughput.

concepts.title: Speculative decoding
concepts.hook: Draft model generates tokens; verify with large model; amortizes large model cost.

concepts.title: Prompt caching and KV cache reuse
concepts.hook: Cache prompt embeddings/KV for repeated queries; reduces latency and cost.

concepts.title: Beam search vs greedy decoding
concepts.hook: Greedy: fast, high variance; beam: slower, better quality.

concepts.title: Structured generation and constrained decoding
concepts.hook: Enforce output format (JSON, regex); reduces invalid outputs.

concepts.title: Post-training quantization (PTQ) vs quantization-aware training (QAT)
concepts.hook: PTQ: no retraining; QAT: slight accuracy loss but better.

concepts.title: INT8 and INT4 quantization
concepts.hook: INT8: minimal overhead; INT4: 75% memory reduction but accuracy risk.

concepts.title: Bfloat16 and mixed precision
concepts.hook: Bfloat16 faster than float32 on modern GPUs; reduced precision doesn't hurt much.

concepts.title: GPTQ, AWQ, GGUF quantization formats
concepts.hook: Post-training quantization specific formats; tradeoff inference speed vs model size.

concepts.title: Quantization-aware training with learned scaling
concepts.hook: Quantization scales learned during training; better accuracy.

concepts.title: Data parallelism for inference
concepts.hook: Replicate model; each GPU processes different request; synchronization minimal.

concepts.title: Tensor parallelism (TP)
concepts.hook: Split layers across devices; each device computes part of matmul; reduces latency per token.

concepts.title: Pipeline parallelism (PP)
concepts.hook: Split model layers across devices; temporal pipeline; reduces per-device memory.

concepts.title: Unified serving frameworks (vLLM distributed, TensorRT-LLM multi-GPU)
concepts.hook: TP is standard for LLMs; PP less common.

concepts.title: Image encoding and patch embeddings
concepts.hook: ViT-style patch encoding; project images to token space.

concepts.title: Visual-language alignment (CLIP, ALIGN)
concepts.hook: Contrastive learning of image-text pairs; enables zero-shot classification.

concepts.title: Token interleaving and mixed modality
concepts.hook: Interleave image and text tokens; enables cross-modal reasoning.

concepts.title: Document understanding and OCR-free approaches
concepts.hook: Models like GPT-4V and Claude 3.5 handle documents natively.

concepts.title: GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini 3, Qwen VL models
concepts.hook: Understand images, text, video; differences in modality support.

concepts.title: Video understanding and long-video models
concepts.hook: Temporal understanding; sample frames vs dense processing.

concepts.title: Audio and speech models
concepts.hook: Whisper for speech-to-text; Gemini 3 handles audio natively.

concepts.title: Chain-of-thought with visual reasoning
concepts.hook: Explain reasoning over images; improves accuracy.

concepts.title: Visual question answering (VQA)
concepts.hook: Answer questions about images; benchmark for visual understanding.

concepts.title: LangGraph (graph-based, stateful agents)
concepts.hook: Define agents as graphs; checkpointing and observability; enterprise standard.

concepts.title: CrewAI (role-based crews)
concepts.hook: Simple DSL; 20 lines to start; lower learning curve.

concepts.title: OpenAI Agents SDK (handoff pattern)
concepts.hook: Explicit agent-to-agent handoffs; model-locked to OpenAI.

concepts.title: Anthropic Agent SDK
concepts.hook: Deep Claude integration; safety-focused; lighter on orchestration than LangGraph.

concepts.title: AutoGen/AG2 in maintenance mode
concepts.hook: Legacy; limited future development.

concepts.title: Function calling / tool use patterns
concepts.hook: Model calls tools; execute and feed back results.

concepts.title: Tool definition and validation
concepts.hook: JSON schema; parameter validation; error handling.

concepts.title: Parallel tool execution
concepts.hook: Call multiple tools in one turn; efficiency.

concepts.title: Tool composition and chaining
concepts.hook: Use output of one tool as input to another.

concepts.title: ReAct (Reasoning + Acting)
concepts.hook: Think, then act; observe results; loop.

concepts.title: Hierarchical agents and delegation
concepts.hook: Agents managing sub-agents; delegation for complex tasks.

concepts.title: Self-correction and error handling
concepts.hook: Detect errors; retry or replan.

concepts.title: Agent evaluation and reliability
concepts.hook: Metrics for agent success; tradeoff: cost vs quality.

concepts.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
concepts.hook: Standardize agent-tool communication; Anthropic contributes to Linux Foundation.

concepts.title: Agent-to-Agent Protocol (A2A)
concepts.hook: Enable agents to discover and communicate with other agents.

concepts.title: Standard benchmarks (MMLU, GSM8K, HumanEval, ARC)
concepts.hook: Know what they measure; limitations.

concepts.title: Long-context benchmarks (LongBench, InfiniteBench)
concepts.hook: Evaluate context window capability.

concepts.title: Reasoning benchmarks (MATH, Codeforces)
concepts.hook: Hard tasks; discriminate capabilities.

concepts.title: Leaderboards (Open LLM Leaderboard, LMSYS)
concepts.hook: Track progress; understand limitations of rankings.

concepts.title: Ragas for RAG evaluation
concepts.hook: Retrieval, answer relevance, groundedness, context precision.

concepts.title: DeepEval (50+ metrics, pytest integration)
concepts.hook: Comprehensive open-source eval framework.

concepts.title: Langfuse for observability and tracing
concepts.hook: Track latency, cost, errors; vendor-agnostic.

concepts.title: Braintrust for full lifecycle evaluation
concepts.hook: Eval, monitoring, release gates; competitive with DeepEval.

concepts.title: Arize Phoenix for agent evaluation
concepts.hook: Multi-step tracing; assess agent decision-making.

concepts.title: Manual evaluation and annotation
concepts.hook: Gold standard; expensive but ground truth.

concepts.title: LLM-as-judge evaluation
concepts.hook: Use LLM to score outputs; bias risk; cheaper than manual.

concepts.title: User-based evaluation and feedback loops
concepts.hook: Online evaluation; real performance metrics.

concepts.title: Load balancing and autoscaling for LLM endpoints
concepts.hook: Balance across replicas; scale on latency/QPS.

concepts.title: Model versioning and canary rollouts
concepts.hook: Shadow traffic, gradual rollouts; compare versions.

concepts.title: Cost management (prompt caching, batching, model selection)
concepts.hook: Optimize $ per request; tradeoff latency vs cost.

concepts.title: Multi-model serving and model router
concepts.hook: Route requests to appropriate model based on size, cost, latency.

concepts.title: Latency, throughput, error rates, cost
concepts.hook: SLOs: p99 latency, error rate < X%.

concepts.title: Token usage and cost tracking
concepts.hook: Count input/output tokens; track spend.

concepts.title: Quality metrics (BLEU, ROUGE, exact match)
concepts.hook: Monitor outputs against baselines.

concepts.title: User feedback and logging
concepts.hook: Collect thumbs up/down; track user satisfaction.

concepts.title: Model output drift (quality change)
concepts.hook: Compare outputs to baseline; detect degradation.

concepts.title: Distribution shift in inputs
concepts.hook: User queries change; model may not generalize.

concepts.title: Retraining triggers and refresh cadence
concepts.hook: When to fine-tune with new data? Cost vs benefit.

concepts.title: Mamba-3 and state-space models (SSMs)
concepts.hook: Linear-time sequence modeling; 64K-128K context with low cost.

concepts.title: Hybrid architectures (Jamba, Zamba2)
concepts.hook: Combine attention + SSM; best-of-both tradeoff.

concepts.title: Context length extrapolation techniques
concepts.hook: Extend beyond training context (RoPE interpolation, continued pretraining).

concepts.title: Ring attention and distributed long-context
concepts.hook: Enable training/serving of extremely long contexts.

concepts.title: OpenAI o3 and o-series reasoning models
concepts.hook: Allocate compute at inference time; solve harder problems.

concepts.title: Extended thinking and chain-of-thought variants
concepts.hook: More thinking tokens improve reasoning.

concepts.title: Inference-time scaling laws
concepts.hook: More test-time steps → better performance; economics vary.

concepts.title: DeepSeek-R1 and open reasoning models
concepts.hook: Open-source reasoning; scaling laws for open models.

concepts.title: Qwen 3.5 Omni and other state-of-the-art
concepts.hook: Latest frontier models; compare on benchmarks.

concepts.title: Open vs closed model tradeoffs (control, privacy, cost, perf)
concepts.hook: Know when each makes sense.

concepts.title: Universal approximation of transformers
concepts.hook: Capacity to express any function; attention enables this.

concepts.title: Attention as kernel method
concepts.hook: Formal connection to kernel machines; interpretability.

concepts.title: Implicit regularization in transformers
concepts.hook: SGD trajectory; why transformers generalize without explicit regularization.

concepts.title: Theoretical analysis of softmax bottleneck
concepts.hook: Rank of softmax output limited; architectural implications.

concepts.title: Linear attention and kernel methods
concepts.hook: Replace softmax with kernel; linear complexity but rank limitation.

concepts.title: Efficient attention (sparse, local)
concepts.hook: Approximations; bounds on approximation error.

concepts.title: Attention head specialization
concepts.hook: Different heads do different jobs (position, syntax, semantics); interpretability.

concepts.title: Gradient flow in deep transformers
concepts.hook: Layer norm and residuals enable stable gradients.

concepts.title: Exploding/vanishing gradient analysis
concepts.hook: When do gradients blow up or shrink?

concepts.title: Normalization layers (LayerNorm, RMSNorm, PreNorm)
concepts.hook: Impact on gradient flow and trainability.

concepts.title: SGD convergence analysis (convex and non-convex)
concepts.hook: Convergence rates; when does SGD work?

concepts.title: Adam convergence and limitations
concepts.hook: Adaptive learning rates; non-convergence in some settings.

concepts.title: Sharpness vs flatness of minima
concepts.hook: Flat minima generalize better; SAM (Sharpness-Aware Minimization).

concepts.title: Second-order optimization and Hessian-free methods
concepts.hook: Natural gradient, Newton methods; expensive but fewer iterations.

concepts.title: VC dimension and Rademacher complexity
concepts.hook: Capacity measures; generalization bounds.

concepts.title: PAC learning framework
concepts.hook: Probably approximately correct; formal learning theory.

concepts.title: Implicit regularization of SGD
concepts.hook: SGD acts as regularizer; converges to minimum norm solution.

concepts.title: Compute optimal scaling (Chinchilla, LLaMA paper scaling laws)
concepts.hook: Optimal allocation of training compute between data and model size.

concepts.title: Loss scaling laws and extrapolation
concepts.hook: Predict loss at different scales; smooth relationships.

concepts.title: Downstream scaling laws
concepts.hook: How do improvements on pre-training loss translate to downstream tasks?

concepts.title: Scaling laws for long context
concepts.hook: Does efficiency/quality scale linearly or worse with context length?

concepts.title: In-context learning as emergence
concepts.hook: Sudden acquisition of ICL ability; why does it emerge?

concepts.title: Grokking phenomenon
concepts.hook: Long training before generalization; mechanism unclear.

concepts.title: Superposition and interpretability crisis
concepts.hook: Features in superposition; individual neurons not interpretable.

concepts.title: Activation patching and causal tracing
concepts.hook: Which components cause outputs; tracing attention flow.

concepts.title: Layer-wise relevance propagation
concepts.hook: Decompose predictions into feature contributions.

concepts.title: Attention head interpretability
concepts.hook: What do attention patterns tell us? Limitations and risks.

concepts.title: Neuron and circuit level analysis
concepts.hook: Individual neuron computation; circuits of neurons.

concepts.title: SAE (Sparse Autoencoders) and superposition disentanglement
concepts.hook: Decompose superposition into interpretable features.

concepts.title: Mamba and state-space models (SSMs)
concepts.hook: Selective SSM; linear complexity with strong performance.

concepts.title: Jamba and hybrid architectures
concepts.hook: Mix attention and SSM; what's the right composition?

concepts.title: Vision transformer improvements and efficiency
concepts.hook: Patches, efficient tokens, hierarchical designs.

concepts.title: Constitutional AI and scalable oversight
concepts.hook: Self-improving with principles; beyond RLHF.

concepts.title: Representation alignment across models
concepts.hook: When do different models learn similar features?

concepts.title: Inverse scaling and capability collapse
concepts.hook: When do larger models perform worse?

concepts.title: Multimodal fusion architectures
concepts.hook: How to fuse vision, language, audio; what fusion works?

concepts.title: Chain-of-thought in theory
concepts.hook: Why does step-by-step reasoning work? Capacity arguments.

concepts.title: Test-time compute research
concepts.hook: Optimal allocation of compute at test vs train time.

concepts.title: CNN architectures (ResNet, EfficientNet, Vision Transformers)
concepts.hook: Know tradeoffs: accuracy, latency, size.

concepts.title: Object detection (YOLO, Faster R-CNN, RetinaNet)
concepts.hook: Bounding boxes; speed vs accuracy tradeoff.

concepts.title: Data augmentation for vision (AutoAugment, RandAugment)
concepts.hook: Proven to improve robustness and generalization.

concepts.title: Semantic segmentation (FCN, U-Net, DeepLab)
concepts.hook: Per-pixel classification; downsampling + upsampling.

concepts.title: Instance segmentation (Mask R-CNN, DETR)
concepts.hook: Per-object + per-pixel; more complex than semantic.

concepts.title: CLIP and vision-language pre-training
concepts.hook: Contrastive learning; zero-shot capabilities.

concepts.title: Visual question answering (VQA)
concepts.hook: Understand images + answer questions.

concepts.title: Document understanding and OCR
concepts.hook: Extract text and structure from documents.

concepts.title: Collaborative filtering (user-user, item-item, matrix factorization)
concepts.hook: Recommend based on user history.

concepts.title: Content-based filtering and features
concepts.hook: Recommend based on item features.

concepts.title: Learning-to-rank and ranking models
concepts.hook: Pairwise, listwise objectives.

concepts.title: Two-tower and dual-encoder models
concepts.hook: Efficient large-scale retrieval.

concepts.title: Temporal dynamics and time-aware recommendations
concepts.hook: Users' preferences change; incorporate time.

concepts.title: Cold-start problem and exploration-exploitation
concepts.hook: New users/items; tradeoff exploration vs exploitation.

concepts.title: Embedding-based retrieval at scale
concepts.hook: Efficient nearest-neighbor search in huge item catalogs.

concepts.title: ARIMA and exponential smoothing
concepts.hook: Stationary models; decomposition into trend/seasonality.

concepts.title: Seasonality and trend decomposition
concepts.hook: Separate components; often easier to model separately.

concepts.title: LSTM/GRU for sequential modeling
concepts.hook: RNNs handle variable-length sequences.

concepts.title: Transformers for time series
concepts.hook: Attention enables long-range dependencies.

concepts.title: Temporal convolutional networks (TCN)
concepts.hook: Causal convolutions; parallel computation.

concepts.title: Point forecasts and confidence intervals
concepts.hook: Quantile regression for intervals.

concepts.title: Probabilistic forecasting
concepts.hook: Model full distribution; necessary for planning.

concepts.hook: Transform audio into visual-like representation.

concepts.title: Audio augmentation techniques

concepts.hook: Convert speech to text; CTC or attention-based.

concepts.hook: Robust, multilingual speech recognition.
